styleGuide: Cinematic mythic illustration, deep midnight sky, luminous celestial accents, refined editorial composition, no text, no watermark, mobile-safe crop.

storyPrompts.tiger: A guardian tiger from ancient Chinese zodiac mythology standing beneath silver constellations, ceremonial golden markings, calm protective expression, star-dusted mountain forest.
storyPrompts.sagittarius: The wise centaur Chiron as Sagittarius, drawing a luminous bow under a Greek night sky, scholarly and compassionate, marble ruins and soft cosmic glow.
storyPrompts.aurora: Nordic aurora spirits dancing as ribbons of green, violet, and rose light above snowy tundra, quiet mythic atmosphere, elegant ethereal motion.
storyPrompts.kalpavriksha: The Indian wish-fulfilling tree Kalpavriksha with jeweled leaves and cosmic roots, sacred mountain atmosphere, warm golden blessings, serene devotional tone.
storyPrompts.anubis: Anubis in the hall of truth weighing a heart against a feather, ancient Egyptian celestial chamber, dignified and mysterious, warm gold and deep lapis.
storyPrompts.amaterasu: Amaterasu emerging from the heavenly rock cave, first sunlight spilling across sacred Japan, mirror glint, radiant yet gentle divine presence.
storyPrompts.sidhe: Celtic Sidhe fairy hill in Irish mist, moonlit grass, hidden doorway to an otherworldly palace, delicate lights and ancient druidic mystery.
storyPrompts.quetzalcoatl: Feathered serpent deity descending along a stepped pyramid at equinox sunset, emerald feathers, golden maize, Mesoamerican mythic grandeur.
storyPrompts.firebird: Slavic firebird with radiant red-gold feathers lighting a winter orchard of golden apples, hopeful and magical, dark forest background.
storyPrompts.genie: A brass lamp genie and flying carpet above an Arabian night market, blue smoke, stars and desert moon, luxurious but storybook-like wonder.
